headline: Huntington Ingalls (NYSE:HII) Surprises With Q1 CY2026 Sales
summary: Aerospace and defense company Huntington Ingalls (NYSE:HII) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 13.4% year on year to $3.10 billion. Its GAAP profit of $3.79 per share was 2.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
